# Rohan Holegadde Suresh — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Rohan Holegadde Suresh, a Software Engineer based in Auckland, New Zealand, specialising in AI/ML, web development and data-driven systems.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Rohan's background, skills, experience, recommendations, projects, certifications and contact details.

## Sections

- [About](/#about): Background, education timeline and personal story.
- [Skills](/#skills): Technical skills across AI/ML, web development and data.
- [Experience](/#experience): Professional journey and current roles in Auckland.
- [Recommendations](/#recommendations): Testimonials from colleagues and mentors.
- [Projects](/#projects): Academic and personal projects with research metadata.
- [Certifications](/#certifications): Verified certifications across AI, data, cloud, software and security.
- [Life.exe](/#hobbies): Hobbies and interests outside of engineering.
- [Contact](/#contact): Ways to get in touch.

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/RohanHolegaddeSuresh): Additional projects and research papers.
